title: Veo 3.1 — Google's 4K AI Video Generator with Audio | yino.ai
description: Create 4K AI videos with Veo 3.1. Text to video and image to video with native audio, scene extension, and character consistency. Try free.

hero.title: Veo 3.1 — The First AI Video Generator to Deliver True 4K with Native Audio
hero.description: Google DeepMind's Veo 3.1 generates broadcast-quality video at up to 4K resolution with synchronized dialogue, sound effects, and ambient audio — all in one step. Use text prompts, reference images, or first-and-last frame control to shape every scene. Extend clips to over two minutes with seamless Scene Extension.

features.title: What Makes Veo 3.1 the Standard for AI Filmmaking
features.subtitle: True 4K output, native audio, and scene-level control that no other model matches.

item-1.title: True 4K Resolution at Up to 60fps
item-1.description: Veo 3.1 is the first mainstream AI video generator to output native 4K (3840×2160) — no upscaling artifacts. At up to 60 frames per second, every frame holds broadcast and cinema-grade clarity. Choose 720p or 1080p for faster Veo text to video iterations, or 4K for final production output.

item-2.title: Synchronized Audio Built Into Every Clip
item-2.description: Veo 3.1 generates audio natively alongside video. Describe the soundscape you want — dialogue in quotes, specific sound effects, ambient noise — and the Veo AI video generator delivers a complete clip with lip-synced speech, contextual SFX, and environmental audio at 48kHz quality. No separate audio workflow required.

item-3.title: Ingredients-to-Video Reference System
item-3.description: Upload up to 3 reference images to guide character appearance, visual style, and scene composition. Veo 3.1 maintains identity consistency across generations — the same character looks the same whether the setting changes from a rooftop to a forest. First-and-last frame control lets you define exactly where your Veo image to video scene begins and ends.

item-4.title: Scene Extension Beyond Two Minutes
item-4.description: A single Veo 3.1 generation produces 4 to 8 seconds. Scene Extension chains up to 20 continuations into one seamless video — reaching roughly 148 seconds total. Each extension maintains visual coherence, character consistency, and audio continuity, turning short clips into full narrative sequences.

howItWorks.title: How to Create Videos with Veo 3.1
howItWorks.subtitle: From prompt to cinematic AI video with native audio.

step-1.title: Write Your Prompt and Add References
step-1.description: Describe the scene, camera movement, and audio you want. Use cinematic terms like "tracking shot" or "rack focus" — Veo 3.1 understands professional film language. For Veo image to video, upload reference images to lock character appearance and style. Add first and last frames to control the scene arc.

step-2.title: Choose Resolution, Duration, and Format
step-2.description: Select 720p, 1080p, or 4K resolution. Set duration to 4, 6, or 8 seconds per generation. Pick landscape 16:9 for widescreen or portrait 9:16 for vertical platforms like TikTok and Reels. Use Veo 3.1 Fast for quick Veo text to video previews, or standard for maximum visual fidelity.

step-3.title: Generate, Extend, and Download
step-3.description: Submit and receive your video with synchronized audio in minutes. Need a longer sequence? Use Scene Extension to add 7 seconds per step — up to 20 extensions for a continuous two-minute video. Download the finished clip ready for publishing.

whyChoose.title: Why Filmmakers and Creators Choose Veo 3.1

item-1.title: Broadcast-Ready 4K Output
item-1.description: Veo 3.1 delivers true 4K at up to 60fps — the only AI video generator producing footage suitable for television, cinema screens, and high-end marketing without upscaling.

item-2.title: Complete Audio-Video in One Generation
item-2.description: Dialogue with lip-sync, ambient soundscapes, and timed sound effects are generated alongside video. Veo 3.1 outputs polished clips that need no audio post-production.

item-3.title: Rock-Solid Character Consistency
item-3.description: Reference images keep characters looking identical across scenes and extensions. Hair, clothing, and facial features remain stable even through camera angle changes and environment shifts.

item-4.title: Native Vertical Video for Mobile Platforms
item-4.description: Veo 3.1 composes natively for 9:16 portrait format — no cropping from horizontal footage. Purpose-built framing for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

item-5.title: Professional Camera Language Understanding
item-5.description: Dolly zooms, rack focuses, tracking shots, and POV switches all execute accurately from text prompts. Veo 3.1 interprets cinema terminology the way a director would describe it.

item-6.title: Two-Minute Continuous Sequences
item-6.description: Scene Extension chains 8-second clips into seamless narratives up to 148 seconds. Visual style, character identity, and audio tone stay consistent across every extension.

pricing.subtitle: Veo 3.1 Pricing
pricing.description: Start creating with free credits. Choose a plan that fits your video production workflow.

item-1.question: What resolutions and frame rates does Veo 3.1 support?
item-1.answer: Veo 3.1 generates video at 720p, 1080p, or true 4K (3840×2160). Standard output runs at 24fps for cinematic content, with up to 60fps available in 4K mode. It's the first mainstream AI video generator to deliver native 4K without upscaling.

item-2.question: How does Veo 3.1 generate audio with video?
item-2.answer: Veo 3.1 generates audio natively as part of the video creation process — not as a separate step. Include dialogue in quotes, describe sound effects explicitly, and set the ambient atmosphere in your prompt. The model produces synchronized audio at 48kHz with lip-sync accuracy under 120ms.

item-3.question: How long can a Veo 3.1 video be?
item-3.answer: Each generation produces a 4, 6, or 8-second clip. Scene Extension adds 7 seconds per step, and you can chain up to 20 extensions for a continuous video of approximately 148 seconds. The final output is delivered as a single merged file with consistent visuals and audio.

item-4.question: How does Veo image to video work with reference images?
item-4.answer: Upload up to 3 reference images to guide Veo 3.1. Use a single image as the opening frame, two images for first-and-last frame control, or three images for style and character consistency across the generation. The model preserves identity, clothing, and visual style from your references.

item-5.question: Does Veo 3.1 support vertical video for TikTok and Reels?
item-5.answer: Yes. Veo 3.1 generates native 9:16 portrait video — the model composes specifically for vertical viewing rather than cropping horizontal footage. This means better framing, no quality loss, and output optimized for mobile-first platforms.

item-6.question: What is the difference between Veo 3.1 standard and fast mode?
item-6.answer: Veo 3.1 Fast generates video approximately 30% faster than standard mode with nearly identical visual quality — ideal for rapid Veo text to video iteration and previewing. Standard mode maximizes fidelity for final production output.
